holdings.infoBox: CDC is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are WEC Energy Group stock at 1.65%, Alliant Energy at 1.64%, Duke Energy at 1.64%, Evergy at 1.62%, and FirstEnergy at 1.60%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares US EQ Income Enhanced Volatility Wtd ETF (CDC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of 100 high-yield stocks pulled from the largest 500 US stocks, with an earnings screen and volatility weighting. CDC was launched on Jul 2, 2014 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Nasdaq Victory U.S. Large Cap High Dividend 100 Long/Cash Volatility Weighted Index
